untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options-specific indicators (dividend_amount, time_value_remaining, days_to_ex_dividend, intrinsic_value, moneyness_flag) that are not available in the allowed indicator list. The rule operates on options Greeks and corporate event calendars, not price action or technical indicators. Standard OHLCV-based backtesting engines cannot evaluate early exercise decisions on American calls without explicit dividend tracking and option pricing models.
translation_notes: Signal ID NATENBERG_DRY_114_0 is a fundamental options pricing rule from Natenberg's work on option volatility. It cannot be converted to a technical indicator rule because: (1) it requires forward-looking dividend event data; (2) it requires option Greeks (time_value); (3) it requires options valuation logic (intrinsic vs time value comparison); (4) the decision is binary (exercise vs hold) not directional. This requires a dedicated options backtester with dividend calendars and option pricing models, not a price-action signal translator.
